mapper.sql: work_order_id, order_no, tenant_id, title, description, source, space_scope, status, reporter_account_id, reporter_uid, reporter_user_id, room_id, building_id, location_text, need_manual_location, location_locked, assigned_user_id, assignee_role_key, assignee_dept_id, category, risk_level, survey_summary, plan_budget, fund_source, fund_gate_blocked, satisfaction_score, satisfaction_comment, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_work_order ( tenant_id, title, description, source, space_scope, status, reporter_account_id, reporter_uid, reporter_user_id, room_id, building_id, location_text, need_manual_location, location_locked, assigned_user_id, assignee_role_key, assignee_dept_id, category, risk_level, survey_summary, plan_budget, fund_source, fund_gate_blocked, satisfaction_score, satisfaction_comment, version ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{source}, #{spaceScope}, #{status}, #{reporterAccountId}, #{reporterUid}, #{reporterUserId}, #{roomId}, #{buildingId}, #{locationText}, #{needManualLocation}, #{locationLocked}, #{assignedUserId}, #{assigneeRoleKey}, #{assigneeDeptId}, #{category}, #{riskLevel}, #{surveySummary}, #{planBudget}, #{fundSource}, #{fundGateBlocked}, #{satisfactionScore}, #{satisfactionComment}, #{version} )

sql.if: AND ( wo.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR wo.order_no ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR wo.location_text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT wo. FROM t_repair_work_order wo WHERE ORDER BY wo.create_time DESC, wo.work_order_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_repair_work_order wo WHERE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_work_order SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, room_id = #{roomId}, building_id = #{buildingId}, location_text = #{locationText}, need_manual_location = #{needManualLocation}, location_locked = #{locationLocked}, assigned_user_id = #{assignedUserId}, assignee_role_key = #{assigneeRoleKey}, assignee_dept_id = #{assigneeDeptId}, category = #{category}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, survey_summary = #{surveySummary}, plan_budget = #{planBudget}, fund_source = #{fundSource}, fund_gate_blocked = #{fundGateBlocked}, satisfaction_score = #{satisfactionScore}, satisfaction_comment = #{satisfactionComment}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_work_order_event ( work_order_id, tenant_id, action, from_status, to_status, actor_account_id, actor_identity_type, actor_identity_id, remark, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{workOrderId}, #{tenantId}, #{action}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actorAccountId}, #{actorIdentityType}, #{actorIdentityId}, #{remark}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSONB) )
mapper.select: SELECT event_id, work_order_id, tenant_id, action, from_status, to_status, actor_account_id, actor_identity_type, actor_identity_id, remark, payload_json::text AS payload_json, create_time FROM t_repair_work_order_event WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, event_id ASC
